segments.text: Sing to the Lord a new song, his praise in the assembly of his faithful people.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let Israel rejoice in their Maker; let the people of Zion be glad in their King.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let them praise his name with dancing and make music to him with timbrel and harp.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: For the Lord takes delight in his people; he crowns the humble with victory.
Let his faithful people rejoice in this honor and sing for joy on their beds.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: May the praise of God be in their mouths and a double-edged sword in their hands,
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: to inflict vengeance on the nations and punishment on the peoples,
to bind their kings with fetters, their nobles with shackles of iron,
to carry out the sentence written against them— this is the glory of all his faithful people.
